recommendations.title: The Roaring Twenties
recommendations.overview: After World War I, Armistice Lloyd Hart goes back to practice law, former saloon keeper George Hally turns to bootlegging, and out-of-work Eddie Bartlett becomes a cab driver. Eddie builds a fleet of cabs through delivery of bootleg liquor and hires

recommendations.title: George of the Jungle 2
recommendations.overview: George and Ursula now have a son, George Junior, so Ursula's mother arrives to try and take them back to "civilization".

recommendations.title: Christmas Vacation 2: Cousin Eddie's Island Adventure

recommendations.title: It's a Wonderful Life
recommendations.overview: George Bailey has spent his entire life giving to the people of Bedford Falls.  All that prevents rich skinflint Mr. Potter from taking over the entire town is George's modest building and loan company.  But on Christmas Eve the business's $8,000 is

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: Venom: The Last Dance
recommendations.overview: Eddie and Venom are on the run. Hunted by both of their worlds and with the net closing in, the duo are forced into a devastating decision that will bring the curtains down on Venom and Eddie's last dance.

recommendations.title: Sublime

recommendations.title: Eddie Murphy: Delirious
recommendations.overview: Taped live and in concert at Constitution Hall in Washington, D.C. in August, 1983, Eddie Murphy: Delirious captures Eddie Murphy's wild and outrageous stand-up comedy act, which he performed in New York and eighteen other cities across the U.S. to s

recommendations.title: Love Is Strange
recommendations.overview: After 39 years together, Ben and George finally tie the knot, but George loses his job as a result, and the newlyweds must sell their New York apartment and live apart, relying on friends and family to make ends meet.
